esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-couchbase.cluster-default
| WHERE couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.total.value.bytes > 0
| EVAL ram_quota_used_pct =
  couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.used.value.bytes * 100.0
  / couchbase.cluster.ram.quota.total.value.bytes
| STATS peak_cluster_ram_quota_pct = MAX(ram_quota_used_pct)
| WHERE peak_cluster_ram_quota_pct > 90.0
